Open Source Intel Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian: American exaggeration and lack of political will prevented the conclusion of an agreement in Islamabad We are ready to continue talks to protect our rights, and Europe must urge America to adhere to legal frameworks Iran's President Pezeshkian to Macron: "Threats, pressure and military action will only exacerbate the U.S.' self-made problems in the region." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043983792231100679/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet

Open Source Intel $270,000,000,000 in damages. BIG 🔴 Fatemeh Mohajerani, Iran’s government spokeswoman, says initial estimates put damage from U.S.–Israel strikes at roughly $270 billion. She noted the figure is preliminary and likely to rise. She says Tehran is now pursuing reparations. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043976482381295846/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet

Open Source Intel CEASEFIRE UPDATE 🔴 Ibrahim Rezaei, spokesman for Iran’s National Security Committee, says the ceasefire must not be extended unless Iran’s rights are recognized, including control over the Strait of Hormuz. He warned the pause must not be used by the U.S. or Israel to regroup or rearm, saying any such move would justify ending it. “If they do not grant us our rights… the ceasefire must be set aside,” he said, adding Iran is prepared to return to war if its demands are not met. tweet

Open Source Intel Iran's President Pezeshkian to Macron: "Threats, pressure and military action will only exacerbate the U.S.' self-made problems in the region." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043983792231100679/photo/1 tweet
The Spectator Index China's president Xi Jinping says the world order is 'crumbling into disarray'. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2043983782508933494/photo/1 tweet

Open Source Intel NEW: CHANNEL 14: IDF Givati Brigade forces captured 3 Hezbollah operatives in Bint Jbeil, Lebanon overnight. One was critically wounded, the two others were lightly wounded, dropped their weapons, and surrendered. They are now in Israel waiting to be handed over for interrogation. tweet

WarTranslated Israel has accepted a Russian vessel carrying stolen Ukrainian grain from temporarily occupied territories. This was reported by Kateryna Yaresko, a journalist for the SeaKrime project of the Myrotvorets Center. The Russian bulk carrier ABINSK was granted permission to enter the Port of Haifa with a cargo of over 43,700 tons of wheat. https://www.facebook.com/kattyfun1?locale=uk_UA tweet
WarMonitor Slovenia’s parliamentary speaker Zoran Stevanović says he wants a referendum on leaving NATO, arguing for an independent path and less involvement in foreign conflicts. tweet

Open Source Intel Saudi Arabia is pushing Trump to lift the naval blockade on Iran and return to talks. Riyadh fears Tehran will order the Houthis to close the Bab el-Mandeb Strait in retaliation. - Wall Street Journal tweet

Open Source Intel Spain's Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez in China: "I firmly believe it is in the interest of both Spain and Europe to strengthen ties with China." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043981026649620892/video/1 tweet

Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇸🇦 🇺🇸 The Wall Street Journal reports that Saudi Arabia is urging the United States to end the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and resume negotiations, fearing further escalation with Iran. Tehran may retaliate by closing the Bab el-Mandeb Strait, a key oil export route for Gulf states. 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 Axios: Marco Rubio will host the Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors in Washington on Tuesday to begin direct talks. 🇮🇷 Official Tehran estimates that damages from the war with the U.S. and Israel amount to $270 billion, though the figure is preliminary and could rise. 🇵🇰 Reuters: U.S. and Iranian negotiating teams are expected to return to Islamabad later this week to continue peace talks. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet

Open Source Intel Kpler data shows the Malawi flagged tanker Rich Starry departed Sharjah in the UAE fully loaded, turned back yesterday, and resumed its voyage today. It is now in the Gulf of Oman en route to China. The vessel has successfully transited the Strait of Hormuz. Because it originated from a UAE port, it was not subject to Washington’s blockade. tweet
⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Golan region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Israeli Channel 14: The Givati Brigade captured three Hezbollah fighters in the heart of Bint Jbeil, southern Lebanon. During the clash, one fighter was shot and critically wounded; two others sustained minor injuries, threw down their weapons, and surrendered. They will be handed over for interrogation by the security establishment. @wfwitness

🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇾🇪 USS George H.W. Bush is avoiding the Red Sea and taking the long route around Africa to reach West Asia, out of fear of Ansar Allah missile and drone strikes . Instead of crossing Bab al-Mandeb, the carrier is making a month-long detour -- an unusual move that highlights Yemen’s growing ability to challenge US naval power at the southern gateway of the Red Sea. The Bush is expected to join the Lincoln for a two-carrier presence in the region, but if America’s most powerful warships must reroute to avoid Ansar Allah, the balance of power at sea is being tested.
↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇹🇷 Footage showcasing the moment of the school shooting in Şanlıurfa. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇹🇷 A 17-year-old former student armed with a hunting rifle stormed a vocational high school in the Siverek district of Şanlıurfa province, opening fire randomly and injuring 16 people – most of them students. The governor said the attacker then shot himself and died. Twelve of the wounded are receiving treatment. @wfwitness

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 Al Araby: The Lebanese government sources said today’s trilateral Lebanese‑American‑Israeli meeting will discuss a ceasefire. Lebanon is counting on U.S. and international pressure on Israel to halt the fire. An Israeli truce declaration is necessary…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed: Lebanese official sources stated that Lebanon’s demands at the trilateral Washington meeting are based on Lebanese President Joseph Aoun’s 9 March initiative, which serves as the foundation for a solution. There is hope that talks will succeed and that Israel will respond to the initiative, but no guarantees have been given. Lebanon continues its contacts to secure a truce or full ceasefire before beginning the negotiation process. @wfwitness

🇹🇷 An 18-year-old opened fire at a school in Turkey and then killed himself, local authorities report. At least 18 people were injured, including students and teachers. The attacker used a pump-action shotgun, first shooting in the schoolyard and then inside the building. The incident took place in the city of Siverek in Turkey’s southeastern Şanlıurfa province. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Open Source Intel Kremlin: Israel is playing a "dangerous game" near Bushehr that endangers Russian specialists and risks a "massive nuclear catastrophe" for the Middle East. The IDF reportedly refined its strike coordinates to avoid Russian personnel. Tensions remained high through the days preceding the ceasefire. - Channel 12 tweet

Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🤡 U.S. Vice President J.D. Vance stated that Washington has achieved its objectives in Iran and that it is now possible to begin ending the military operation. 🇮🇷 In response to the U.S. naval blockade, Iran threatened to close the Bab el-Mandeb Strait — “you will soon nostalgically remember cheap gasoline at $4–5,” said Iran’s parliament speaker. 🟦 Iran has demanded compensation from five Arab countries for their “participation” alongside the U.S. and Israel. At the start of the war, Iran had launched strikes on Bahrain, Jordan, Qatar, the UAE, Saudi Arabia, and other regional states. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet

↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇭🇺 What to know about Hungary’s incoming prime minister, Péter Magyar: 📍 Until 2024, he held senior positions in state structures, particularly in the banking sector and EU-related fields. 📍 He was married to Judit Varga, a key figure in Orbán’s government and former justice minister. 📍 His career advancement was largely based on connections within Orbán’s circle. 📍 Inside the system, he was viewed as a confrontational and overly independent figure, which limited his access to top positions. 📍 After his divorce and the loss of political backing, he gradually lost influence and stepped away from key roles. 📍 A turning point came with the 2024 scandal involving a pardon linked to covering up child sexual abuse. Following this, Magyar publicly broke with the system and accused it of corruption, nepotism, abuse of power, and “mafia-style” governance. 📍 He then became one of the main public opponents of the government and took leadership of the Tisza party, which quickly evolved into a leading opposition force. 📍 In foreign policy, he maintains a cautious stance: not openly pro-Ukraine, careful toward the EU and NATO, critical of accelerating Ukraine’s EU membership, while distancing himself from Orbán’s pro-Russian course and not blocking the EU’s €90 billion support initiative for Ukraine. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet

Norway’s planned delivery of at least six F-16 jets to Ukraine is facing major delays, with none transferred as of April 2026. Even in the best-case scenario, the jets may not arrive until 2027—far later than the original 2024 timeline. Source: Defense Express
Spain has officially launched a major plan to regularize undocumented migrants.

🇪🇺 "The cheapest energy is the one you don't use." - Reich Gauleitierin von der Leyen 🐻 It's nice that Europeans have strong leadership, that has plans in place for almost everything. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇴🇲 The UKMTO reported an incident on April 7, 2026, about 112 nautical miles southeast of Ras Al Hadd, Oman. A bulk carrier was hit by two unidentified projectiles, causing a fire onboard. A Pakistani naval vessel assisted, and the situation has since been resolved. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The Chinese Foreign Ministry has warned that it will respond firmly if the United States imposes tariffs based on "fabricated allegations" that Beijing has provided military aid to Iran. @wfwitness
⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Al Jazeera: A Pakistani Foreign Ministry source said that Islamabad has offered to host a second round of negotiations between the United States and Iran. @wfwitness

🔄 Forwarded from Seyed Mohammad Marandi: My advice to anyone who wants to better understand the Iranian-US relationship during these very challenging times is to read 'Going to Tehran' by Flynt and Hillary Mann Leverett. Both authors served as senior officials in the US National Security Council.

⚡️ 🇷🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Russia’s ambassador to Tehran, Alexey Dedov, said the United States still has not understood that the language of force does not work with Iran. He condemned attacks on Iran and pointed to the Tehran‑Moscow strategic treaty. Dedov added that Iran is defending its rights, and that Washington claims Tehran should not have nuclear weapons while ignoring Iran’s repeated statements that its nuclear programme is peaceful. @wfwitness

⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 German Foreign Minister Johann Wadephul said direct talks between Israel and Lebanon can be an important first step towards respecting both Israel’s legitimate security interests and Lebanon’s territorial integrity. He called for Hezbollah’s attacks on Israel to stop and supported Lebanon’s monopoly on force and Hezbollah’s disarmament. He added that the Israeli army must protect civilians and civilian infrastructure. Germany provided an additional €45 million in humanitarian aid to Lebanon in March. @wfwitness
